Estimate    Actual  Operator
       1         1  PROJECT count AS _col0
       1         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(count_3) AS count
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE GATHER
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(c_custkey) AS count_3
       -         1  CROSS JOIN LOOP
  150000         1  │└FILTER c_custkey = 1
  150000    150000  │ TABLE SCAN customer
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE GATHER
       -         1  GROUP BY HASH o_custkey
       -         1  DISTRIBUTE HASH ON o_custkey
       -         1  GROUP BY PARTIAL o_custkey
 1500000         6  FILTER o_custkey = 1
 1500000   1500000  TABLE SCAN orders
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(c.c_custkey)
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer
  WHERE c_custkey = 1
) AS c
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
  WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
);

theorem.description: Count CUSTOMER rows with a matching ORDERS row via EXISTS with a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-SEMI-CUSTOMER-ORDERS-FILTER-CUSTOMER
